heading: Everything in one intelligent platform
subheading: Stop juggling multiple tools. Our AI-powered automation anticipates your needs, reduces repetitive work, and keeps you focused on strategic decisions.

recruiting.title: Smart Recruiting
recruiting.description: AI-powered candidate matching, scoring, and screening. Find better candidates faster while reducing manual review work by hours per week.

ats.title: ATS Pipeline
ats.description: Customizable Kanban stages for every position. Track every candidate from CV to signed contract with AI-assisted scheduling and planning.

onboarding.title: Onboarding Module
onboarding.description: Automated workflows, e-documents and company introduction. Make new hires productive from day one with structured, consistent experiences.

analytics.title: HR Analytics
analytics.description: Time-to-hire, cost-per-hire, retention rate and dozens of other real-time metrics.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Over 50 ready-made connections — Slack, LinkedIn, Google Workspace, accounting systems and more.

gdpr.title: GDPR & Security
gdpr.description: Full compliance with European regulations. Role-based access, audit log, and SOC 2 Type II certification.
